fails.why: Only the non-exported isUser helper has a JSDoc block; exported functions (getUser, updateUser, processUsers, ok, err, loadConfig) have no JSDoc at all, so the @example-with-return-value requirement is unmet on exported functions.
Multiple as casts beyond as const remain: L113 'connection as unknown as AsyncDisposable' and repeated '(data as Record<string, unknown>)' at L138/142. Assertion requires zero as casts.
L60 'import { DatabaseConnection } from ./db' is a value import, but DatabaseConnection is used only as a type (parameter at L112). Should be 'import type'.
